message:
test(mcp): add 17 tool definition stability tests + fix compilation errors

- Add 17 unit tests for mcp_tools.rs verifying tool naming conventions,
  schema invariants, required parameters, and definition stability
- Fix descriptors.rs missing AgentType/Detection/Severity imports in tests
- Fix mcp.rs TxStep construction missing `description` field

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
